blended.narrative: Bridger Bowl is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,611 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 7.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 29".
